name: ai_marketing_skills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_skills capability.

prompts.name: growth_experiment_prompt
prompts.template: Analyze this marketing growth data and suggest next growth experiments: {marketing_data}

prompts.name: sales_pipeline_update_prompt
prompts.template: Provide insights and next actions for sales pipeline based on this data: {marketing_data}
prompts.use_case: Managing and automating sales pipelines from lead capture to closing.

prompts.name: content_plan_creation_prompt
prompts.template: Create a content operations plan for the following marketing goals: {campaign_parameters}
prompts.use_case: Planning and scheduling content marketing activities using AI assistance.

prompts.name: seo_optimization_prompt
prompts.template: Generate SEO keyword strategy and site improvements based on this info: {marketing_data}
prompts.use_case: Improving website SEO with AI-powered keyword analysis and optimization.

prompts.name: outbound_campaign_prompt
prompts.template: Design an outbound marketing campaign with these parameters: {campaign_parameters}
prompts.use_case: Automating outbound marketing campaigns such as cold outreach email sequences.

prompts.name: finance_automation_prompt
prompts.template: Automate the marketing finance tasks including budgeting and forecasting with this data: {marketing_data}
prompts.use_case: Automating finance operations related to marketing budgeting and forecasting.
